# EXEC.plan.md (compat)
#
# This repository historically used `vendor/ecma-rs/EXEC.plan.md` as the canonical
# implementation plan for the native AOT compilation track.
#
# The plan has since been moved/renamed to:
#
#   `vendor/ecma-rs/instructions/native_aot.md`
#
# Keep this file as a compatibility shim because many docs/tools (and some agent
# instructions) still link to `EXEC.plan.md`.
#
# See: [`instructions/native_aot.md`](./instructions/native_aot.md)

This file moved to [`instructions/native_aot.md`](./instructions/native_aot.md).
